task_completion.description: Log in to ManageEngine ADAudit Plus
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the technician creation page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add New Technician' or 'Delegation' configuration form is open in the ADAudit Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the required username and full name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input fields for Login Name/Username and Full Name contain 'secanalyst' and 'Security Analyst' respectively.

task_completion.description: Enter the required email and password
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email field contains 'secanalyst@company.local' and the password fields are filled (typically shown as masked characters).

task_completion.description: Select 'Product Authentication' as the authentication type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The radio button or dropdown for Authentication Type is explicitly set to 'Product Authentication' (or ADAudit Plus Authentication, depending on the exact UI version).

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Operator' role and create the account
task_completion.visual_evidence: The role 'Operator' is selected in the roles list/dropdown, and either the save button is clicked or a success message/technician list showing the new 'secanalyst' user is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to create the technician
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface, not a terminal or API script.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application form
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is entered into the actual input fields of the ADAudit Plus web application, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows the form being progressively filled out and submitted within the application UI, without terminal windows executing user-creation scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target technician details are: Username: 'secanalyst', Full Name: 'Security Analyst', Email: 'secanalyst@company.local', Role: 'Operator'. The authentication type must be 'Product Authentication'.
